title: Apothecary Jars Glass Decorative Candy Jars,Candy Buffet Display, Elegant Storage Jar, Decorative Wedding Candy Organizer Canisters Style SA
description:
About this item
Handblown Glass Star: Made from high quality hand-blown high-end sturdy clear glass，A little air bubbles on the bottle body is normal. They are also crystal clear so you can display anything you want and let the contents shine. These small apothecary jars are sure to exceed your expectations- clearly!
Different Styles for All Your Home: Our Glass Jars has a unique shape that works for every setting from bathroom and kitchen storage, to home and venue decoration, garden floral and terrarium displays, and more. They has a separate clear glass lid with a round handle for easy opening and closing.
Decorative Glass Jar :These Glass Apothecary Jars is great for displaying decorative spheres, fruit, stones, flowers, or any other item you wish to coordinate with your decor. Fill it with Christmas ornaments during the holidays, with lemons for a gorgeous table or kitchen display, with glass pebbles and flowers, or fill it with potpourri!
Wide Scope of Application: Those Clear Glass Apothecary Jars ideal for personal use and special events like weddings, receptions, buffets, holiday and family gatherings, buffets and all kinds of parties.Give your home a perfect touch of refined style with this beautiful apothecary jars for elegant taste.
Satisfaction Gauranteed: Size: 3.9Wx8.6"H.If quality and transport damage problems can choose a replacement or refund .Do not hesitate to contact us,we will help you ASAP.Customer satisfaction is on our top priority.
